notes:
## New features

- Lightbox multi-monitor support: a monitor icon in the lightbox toolbar appears when multiple displays are connected. Clicking it opens a screen picker, and numbered overlays appear on each monitor so you can click directly on the screen you want to move the preview to.
- "Trim Transparency" renamed to "Auto Trim" and now works on all formats including JPEG. Automatically detects the border color by sampling all four corners and selecting the majority, with a tolerance of 10 to handle compression artifacts. Falls back to the top-left pixel when corners don't agree.
- AI features: New AI-powered effects available via on-demand model download (no installer size impact). An AI Features dialog lets users select and download the models they want before first use.
  - Upscaling increases image resolution 2x or 4x, recovering detail that standard resizing cannot.
  - Background Removal automatically removes image backgrounds. Choose Standard or High Quality for better edge detail on hair, fur, and fine textures. A Background control lets you keep the result transparent or fill with a solid color — when output is JPEG or BMP the Color option is forced automatically, and when output is "Same format" a fallback color is available for files that resolve to a non-alpha format.
  - Background Blur keeps the subject sharp while blurring everything behind it. Uses the same downloaded model as Background Removal — no extra download needed.
  - Noise Reduction now has two modes: Median for fast lightweight filtering, and AI for neural network denoising that preserves fine detail more cleanly.
  - AI crop to Resize fill mode which uses object detection to center on the main subject. Falls back to Smart crop when no subject is detected.

## Improvements

- Lightbox zoom and pan are now fully viewport-independent: the zoomed position is preserved when opening or closing the filmstrip or sidebar, and transitions are smooth without any drift. Switching between single-image and side-by-side view preserves the effective zoom level so the same image detail stays at the same magnification.
- Lightbox zoom slider: a compact slider in the toolbar lets you adjust zoom continuously up to 20×. The percentage label doubles as a reset button that returns to fit-to-viewport.
- Padding and Resize fit (exact size / ratio mode) now show a fallback color picker and warning when output is set to "Same format" and Transparent background is selected, since JPEG and BMP files in the batch don't support transparency.
- "Extend" transform renamed to "Padding" for clarity.
- Grid view: new "Info" toggle in the grid toolbar hides the filename, filesize, and dimensions strip beneath each card for a cleaner, image-only layout.
- Compression card: new toggle on the card header to disable compression entirely. When off, output uses lossless encoding (PNG/WebP/AVIF/TIFF) or quality 100 for JPEG, matching the pattern of the Resize card toggle.
- AI Features panel now always shows each model's file size, even after it has been downloaded.
- Add Effect popup now has a search box that filters across all categories as you type.
- Output and Compression sidebar cards are now collapsible, matching the existing Resize, Transforms, Effects, and Advanced Format Options cards.
- Clicking empty space in the file list now deselects all files.
- Context menus on file rows and effects now place Remove direct ly below the primary action (Preview or Duplicate) for faster access.
- Clicking any column in the list or modern view selects the file, not just the name cell.
- Clicking between cards in the grid view no longer accidentally clears the selection.
- Selection bar: "Deselect" replaced with an X button on the right; Remove moved into the actions group; Select All stays visible but disables when all items are selected; inverted colors in dark mode.

## Bug fixes

- Add Effect popup no longer closes when scrolling the effects list.
- Effects saved from older versions of the app that no longer exist now show as "Unknown effect" in the effects list so they can be selected and removed, rather than being invisible.
- Failed files now show a clear error state in all views — hover previews and the lightbox display the original image with a "Processing failed" indicator instead of a blank or generating state.
- Tint effect: opacity slider now works correctly for gradient tints in all blend modes.
